positive: A minimalist and highly stylized illustration of a majestic, stylized mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant, gradient sunset sky. The mountains should feature clean, geometric lines and sharp, contrasting edges. Include stylized elements of flora and fauna, such as a leaping fox and a graceful soaring eagle, also rendered in strong, crisp silhouettes. The color palette should be limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, vibrant coral, and midnight blue. The composition must be centered and suitable for repeating textile patterns, featuring negative space and high contrast. Vector art, screen print style, high detail, clean lines, aesthetically pleasing, ready for apparel printing.
negative: low resolution, blurry, gradient text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, messy, poor anatomy, duplicate, cropped, abstract, noisy, grainy, poorly drawn, extra limbs
